message:
fix(dashboard): make resource paths configurable via environment

Allow STOCKYARD_VM_DIR, STOCKYARD_LEASE_FILE, and STOCKYARD_ZFS_POOL
environment variables to override default paths in handleResources.
Also adds comprehensive parsing tests for TAP interface and ZFS output.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
